expectations.text: Avoids giving a complete patched solution
Analyzes lock ordering, latch protocol, or stale pointer lifetime instead of generic concurrency advice
expectations.evidence: Focuses on latch ordering, safe-node logic, pointer lifetime, and split/merge consistency.

expectations.text: Requests a concrete interleaving, lock trace, or minimal reproducer
expectations.evidence: Requests a lock trace or failure interleaving with thread and page information.
